parents.subject: LU-17000 obdclass: Fix mem leak in pool_add_objects

commit.subject: LU-17000 utils: Fix error reported by coverity in lcfg_setparam_client
commit.message:
LU-17000 utils: Fix error reported by coverity in lcfg_setparam_client

This patch fixes errors reported by coverity under
lcfg_setparam_client().

- Call globfree() to free memory allocated by glob()
- free 'bak_path' after its use
- free 'tmp_path' after its use
- free 'line' after its use
CoverityID: 457066 ("Resource leak")

- Do not call close() in case open() or mkstemp() have falied.
CoverityID: 457074 ("Argument cannot be negative")

- Check for NULL before accessing variable 'buf'
CoverityID: 457081 ("Dereference before null check")

Also add check for NULL after malloc

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ia9b1ac1a0751cd14cb1fda1a7a518af419b84074
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59516
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
